entry.title: DMEE XML file missing nodes
entry.content:
I maintain a copy of standard CGI_XML_CT tree, where I customize some nodes to comply with local bank requirements.
Some nodes do not appear in output xml file at all.
Example: CdtrAgt->FinInstnId->ClrSysMmbId->MmbId. The node is defined as reference to structure field FPAYH-ZBNKL with status 1-Mandatory.
The tree is activated without errors, in F110 no errors appear during payment medium creation. In table REGUH I can see that field ZBNKL is correctly populated. Despite of this, the node is not contained in the file. Same result if I change the status to Standard.
There is no exit function for this node, no conditions.
What else controlls, if a node is tranferred (even blank - without value) to the payment medium?
Within CdtrAgt->FinInstnId there is also the node BIC, mapped to FPAYH-ZSWIF. This node is transferred to an output file without problems.

thanks for any hint

entry.title: Re: Creation of custom field in master data using Custom Field Fiori application in S/4 HANA UPA 202
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing.

Nice blog.

entry.title: Re: crystal report footer blank space at end
entry.content: No, CR for VS will install in VS 2010-> 2022. Note, don't install the MSI packages separately, the installer will do this for you and it confuses VS if both are installed.

entry.title: Re: Why I can not use date/time dimension as linked dimension in optimized mode?
entry.content: Hello, SAP-help confirms this limit (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/7b9defa34dc34c0881dee863e6b4e5c5.html#blending-support-for-sap-bw-live-data-connections-in-optimized-story). Unfortunately there isn't mentioned a reason for it. I hope linking on time dimensions will be possible in the future. Currently there is no such point on the roadmap (https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?range=CURRENT-LAST&PRODUCT=67838200100800006884#Q3%202024).

entry.title: Re: Hide the "post on account " tab in post outgoing payments .
entry.content: Hiding a particular tab is not working in post outgoing payments . For another screens like migo, flavor manager have scripts option. But post outgoing payments tile ,can't have that. And i can't even edit the screen itself. We are searching for another possible ways to solve this. Pls guide us.

entry.title: Business Process Model Connector (BPMC) Sync Solman 7.2 >>Signavio
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to synchronize SAP Solution Manager 7.2 with SAP Signavio. As a baseline, I wanted to import all process steps and associated objects, such as T-codes and Fiori applications from Solution Documentation into Signavio to streamline the modeling process. The process steps and documentation are synchronized, but the objects attached to the process steps do not seem to be copied.

Is it true that the objects do not get copied during the synchronization process? Could someone share their experience or provide insights on this?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Reverse engineer from XSD file, and generating XSM mo...
entry.content:
Hello,

After reversing the xsd file in an XML model, you can find the values of "appinfo" and "documentation" in the Annotation tab of the element properties window.
However, please note that there is no automatic mapping defined in the PDM for these properties during XML > PDM generation. To ensure that the annotation values are propagated to the generated table, you can use transformations to copy the contents and paste them into the comment field.

You can refer to this example for more information:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/example-on-using-powerdesigner-transformation/ba-p/13204781

Kind regards

entry.title: Transfer data from one internal table to another without loop with some conditions
entry.content:
Hi, I have two internal table it_tab1 , it_tab2 of same structure I 1000 record in it_tab1. Now on based on some condition I want to move some records into it_tab2.
I can move this with help of loop but don't want to use loop if anyone can help or suggest some other way then please answer.

entry.title: Get individual primary key values from CDHDR table
entry.content:
Dear all

In CDHDR table, there is a TABKEY column. That column stores the primary key columns concatenated value.

For example, for BSEG, it is something like this -

508123477777777702024666

I realised the pattern falls under this category -

MANDT(3 digits)||BUKRS(4 digits)||BELNR(10 digits)||GJAHR(4 digits)||BUZEI(3 digits)

Now, I like to get the individual column values from the concatenated value. I read in few blogs that there could be a mapping table that helps us to have this logic at scale for several other tables as well like MARA.

Appreciate if you can share with me the SQL query that could translate this mapping at scale for 1000s of SAP tables.

Please note I have replicated from SAP ERP CDPOS & CDHDR tables into Databricks. So, I have to get this logic (SQL query to get primary key columns names in a particular order, then get the individual values from the concatenated TABKEY value based on their positions & length) implemented within Databricks only...

Appreciate any support in this matter 

Br,

Noor.

entry.title: Re: SAC live BW Query variable not applying from URL
entry.content:
Hello @playaben82,

Filling variables of BW query is possible with URL parameter. We are using it in several cases without any problems. Check out SAC help to see how it works.

Best regards

Lothar

entry.title: Re: How to register delivery dates for supplier responses...
entry.content:
Hello @Temp09 

I am not sure if there is any specific solution in sap s/4 hana public cloud for this as delivery date is part of PO, manually it can adjusted however if your need it to be automtated or mass you can check below.

So what can be possible as below

- Using below API to capture the incoming response based on supplier outbound. https://api.sap.com/api/DELIVERYREQUEST_IN/overview 

- Using LCNC portal can be build.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/a-supplier-portal-for-sap-s-4hana-cloud-in-no-code-with-integration-to-sap/ba-p/13580913 

- Lastly if you want to just upload the list of details to the system via excel, may be create a custom CDS expose that as OData API and create an application for the same to upload data.

Best Regards,

Vijayendra

entry.title: copy custom field from SuccessFactors to IAS
entry.content:
I want to copy custom01 field from SuccessFactors to customAttribute2 in IAS using identify provisioning. sf.api.version on source = 2 and ias.api.version on target = 1. I followed the instructions in blog "Efficient Employee Grouping in SAP SuccessFactors: Custom Attribute-based Identity Provisioning", except I can't complete step 1. Source doesn't have sf.user.attributes. When I run the sync I get error 

error=Source path: $.custom01 is not available in content, but is required in defined system transformation Caused by: Source path: $.custom01 is not available in content, but is required in defined system transformation Caused by: No results for path: $['custom01'],

Are there clear instructions on how to copy the custom fields using the same versions I am using?

entry.title: Re: Integrate My Inbox link to SAP Flexible Workflow E-Mail notification
entry.content: This worked like a gem, How do I add system language into the CDS view?

entry.title: Final Review step onboarding email trigger
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have built in the final data review step into my process variant. I activated the email template for the final data review but this is only sent when the data has actually been reviewed. I need an email to be sent to the responsible group alerting them to the need to complete the final data review. Why is there no standard trigger for this or is there something I can re use to send this email to the responsible group?

Has anyone found a solution to this?

Thanks

David

entry.title: Re: Disaggregation Expression when Aggr level is NULL
entry.content:
Hi djwyllie,

have you found a way to solve your problem?

Kind regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Build process automation
entry.content:
Hi @labradoodle 
If you are referring to the  C_LCNC SAP Certified Associate - Low-Code/No-Code Developer - SAP Build then I recommend to access our SAP Certified Associate - Low-Code/No-Code Developer - SAP Build website. 

This page includes
  • Topic areas
  • How to prepare
  • Stay Certified
  • Schedule your exam
  • Safeguarding

This certification verifies that you possess the ability to perform low-code and no-code development with SAP Build. 
-------------------
If you are referring to the  C_WZADM SAP Certified Associate - SAP Build Work Zone - Implementation and Administration I recommend to access our C_WZADM SAP Certified Associate - SAP Build Work Zone - Implementation and Administration  website.

This page includes
  • Topic areas
  • How to prepare
  • Stay Certified
  • Schedule your exam
  • Safeguarding

This certification verifies that you possess the fundamental and core knowledge required of the SAP Build Work Zone implementation and administration profile and proves that you have an overall understanding and in-depth technical skills to participate as a member of a project team in a mentored role. This certificate builds on the basic knowledge gained through related SAP Business Technology Platform and SAP Build Work Zone training. 

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Transfer data from one internal table to another with...
entry.content:
data(itab) = source .
DELETE itab WHERE ****

Thanks

I would like to know how can i access these tables of VIM to query data. I have tried Tables SWWLOGHIST/SWWUSERWI/SWWIHEAD but these dont seem to be the data im looking for.

Anybody know where i can find that information?

entry.title: Re: print warehouse task after confirmation using PPF
entry.content: Hello, did you find any solution on this?

entry.title: Re: Transfer data from one internal table to another with...
entry.content:
Other possible option is use "FOR iteration expression". I recommend to try it at least to see if you like it and fits your needs.

There are examples over the internet and also in ABAP documentation.

entry.title: Re: Integrate My Inbox link to SAP Flexible Workflow E-Mail notification
entry.content:
Can you elaborate what is the use-case behind?

The templates itself are language dependent, so you could just use that. Otherwise, just extend the CDS Views by more fields, e.g. "$session.system_language as system_language" although I'm not sure if that really serves the use-case.

entry.title: Re: SAP VIM Analytics - Table Query
entry.content: I know they are hold in /OPT/VIM_1HEAD but i can query that...

entry.title: Re: oModel.create is not a function
entry.content:
var oModel = this.getView().getModel("ODataM1");  check what you get there during debug.

what's the model version? v2 or v4?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408.1: Final What's New & Product Assistance available
entry.content:
With immediate effect, the final What's New information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408.1 is now available. SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is based on the technical product SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

To access the Final What’s New information, please use the What’s New Viewer.

For further formats and languages of the What's New information, as well as pre-filtered views, please use the following SAP S/4HANA Cloud Help Portal page.

In addition, the final Product Assistance (aka Application Help) for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408.1 is available. Please use the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Help Portal page to access the Product Assistance in multiple languages.

For you as a customers, we recommend to also use the Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool.

The Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool provides you with a personalized and tailored view on What’s New information based on the activated and used scope within your system. The information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408.1 will be available in RASD within the next few days. A valid Customer S-user ID is required for login. We recommend to use RASD to prepare for upgrades and updates of your system and to focus on the new and changed features that are relevant for you as a customer.

There is a new commenting feature available for What’s New. Authors can now evaluate your feedback and incorporate it into the documentation, if needed. We hope that by opening this channel of communication, we can learn how to further improve our What’s New content for you. 

To use this feature, you need to be logged into the Help Portal. The feature will only be available in the English version of the documents. To learn more about how the feedback process works in SAP Help Portal, see Giving Documentation Feedback.

entry.title: Re: Why do Story Reports disappear from report center then reappear periodically?
entry.content: We are facing the same issue, did anyone get a solution?

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Certification
entry.content:
Hi @Ntnguyet1 ,

Welcome aboard! Let me know if you have any questions about what to start studying.

How to figure out if your certification / learning content is free of charge

entry.title: Payment Lot-Posting incomplete
entry.content:
Experts,

Customer is making utility bill payment online which creates a Payment lot in the system via SPROXY(Tcode) Inbound service. In few cases, the payment lot has status '6' - Payment incomplete. I found this thread from Amlan where he explains that it can be because of system resource bottleneck issue and if we post the lot manually from FP05 it should allow us to Post. 

In my case, I tried to close and post the lost from FP05 by clicking . But I am getting below messages:

Function close is not possible, payment lot is incomplete (Message no >2440)
Function post is not possible, payment lot is incomplete (Message no >2440)

As a workaround, I may create a new lot and post the amount. But I would like to know, why a few lots end with Status(DFKKZK-STAZS) as '6'. Also, how can I manually process these lots from FP05 if its feasible. 

Thanks

Bharath

entry.title: Re: Problem with ALV + PDF display in SAP GUI HTML
entry.content: Years later, you get the kudos you deserve good sir.

entry.title: Re: GR error Cost element is not assigned to a cost compo...
entry.content: A S-Id is required

entry.title: Re: liberation strategy connection
entry.content: @SBach  @panushjain thank you guys so much for helping me!

entry.title: Re: AUTO height details section
entry.content:
Ok, i have a patch for this.

In SECTION EXPERT, added another DETAILS section AFTER the one i'm using.

This new section has a small height (+-1/5 of the main DETAILS section).

Then added a SUPRESS condition to this section, so i can add 1/5 space between lines in case the number of lines is near 57.
I know i will have some quotations with tight spaces between lines and other quotations with more space, but is better than having an awfull blank page.

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content:
Hello @VivekKumarVS,

SAP model "SAC_PERFORMANCE_E2E" offers the information of story type for the recently opened stories in your tenant:

Best regards

Lothar

entry.title: Re: Business Process Model Connector (BPMC) Sync Solman 7.2 >>Signavio

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Thank you @David_Chaviano and SAP for such an opportunity.

I'm Anas, an IT Professional with experience in ERP systems, particularly Odoo. I'm excited to enroll in the SAP Business One - 10.0 Implementation course as part of the digital skills initiative

My experience in IT management, cybersecurity, and ERP implementations aligns well with SAP's ecosystem. I've pursued numerous certifications from organizations like Google, IBM, and (ISC)², demonstrating my commitment to ongoing professional development. I'm committed to completing the learning journey before December to take advantage of the voucher opportunity.

I look forward to applying my existing skills to SAP Business One and contributing to discussions within this community. Thank you for providing this valuable learning opportunity.

entry.title: Re: 405 Method Not Allowed when trying HTTP method POST i...
entry.content:
you are not following correctly.

{
 
    "DocType" : "TA",
    "SalesOrg" : "8900",
    "DistrChan" : "10",
    "Division" : "11",
    "TextLine" : "coba text",
    "ItmNumber" : "000010",
    "ReqQty" : "15.000",
    "PartnRole" : "AG",
    "PartnNumb" : "0001000000",
    "Material" : "000000000030000032",
    "Plant" : "8921",
    "TargetQty" : "15.000",
    "CondType" : "",
    "CondValue" : "0.000000000"
 
}

entry.title: Re: Smart Data Streaming - File/Hadoop Json - Array Issue
entry.content: RobertWaywell , I have similar requirement. is regarding JSON Input Kafka Adapter. I want to know the possibility to import JSON array form kafka adapter. Sample JSON want to import from kafka adapter."items": [ { "item‑id":"10", "item‑start‑date":"2024‑08‑07T07:00:00", "item‑end‑date":"2025‑08‑07T06:59:59", "sales_ord_num":"1234545457", "quantity":12 }, { "item‑id":"20", "item‑start‑date":"2024‑08‑07T07:00:00", "item‑end‑date":"2025‑08‑07T06:59:59", "sales_ord_num":"1234545458", "quantity":12 }, { "item‑id":"30", "item‑start‑date":"2024‑08‑07T07:00:00", "item‑end‑date":"2025‑08‑07T06:59:59", "sales_ord_num":"1234545459", "quantity":12 }, { "item‑id":"40", "item‑start‑date":"2024‑08‑07T07:00:00", "item‑end‑date":"2025‑08‑07T06:59:59", "sales_ord_num":"1234545455", "quantity":12 }, { "item‑id":"50", "item‑start‑date":"2024‑08‑07T07:00:00", "item‑end‑date":"2025‑08‑07T06:59:59", "sales_ord_num":"1234545454", "quantity":12 } ] How I can import all 5 Lines from array items[] into Input Stream. Can any one please suggest.

entry.title: Re: Disable or remove permissions for the Introductory Te...
entry.content:
Hello @AF-TJX ,

Are you talking about the ability for end users to add introductory text into their own employee profile header area? If so, there is an option to disable this option.

Navigate to Admin Center > Configure People Profile.

Click on General Settings on the left side. 

On the right side, you should see a check box you can check/uncheck for: Allow employees to enter introductory text.

Hopefully this helps point you in the right direction.

Kind regards,
Cheryl Donnelly - SAP SuccessFactors Preferred Success Platform Functional Lead

Did you find a solution?

Thank you in advance

pfvinuesa

entry.title: Re: Prevent Religion Key on Holiday Calendar from not gen...

I could see the tile . I added the tile. But , the tile is showing error , and its unable to load the UI as well. All the calls it make in network goes "500" and simply says "Internal server error" . entry.title: Queries regarding Data migration approach for PM Data objects
entry.content:
Dear Members,

1. As part of data migration approach using LTMC migration cockpit, team is trying to ascertain if there are any fields available in following master and transactional data from Plant Maintenance Point of view which can be used to populate the Legacy number from ECC system.

  1. Equipment
  2. Maintenance Plan
  3. Notification
  4. Work Order.

Client wants to know if there are any SAP provided guidance / best practices on this as to use which data field to map Legacy number.

2. Is there a possibility in LTMC, to extract the Legacy object field along with the new number created for a data object directly from LTMC cockpit.

Thanks,

Gaurav

entry.title: Re: oModel.create is not a function
entry.content: that's the issue, for odata call, v4 is completely different from v2.

entry.title: Re: oModel.create is not a function
entry.content: your code is for v2, google how to do crud with v4.

entry.title: Adapting Launchpad App Descriptor Items via adaptation mode in Launchpad App Manager
entry.content:
Objective:

The purpose of this blog is to demonstrate how to modify the app descriptor items in SAP-delivered technical catalogs using the adaptation mode in the Launchpad App Manager.

The adaptation mode in the Launchpad App Manager allows us to modify the following fields:

Group of Fields

Field

Target Application Fields

  • Target Application Title
  • Target Mapping Information
  • Device Type - Desktop, Tablet, Phone

Tile Fields

  • Tile Title
  • Tile Subtitle
  • Tile Icon
  • Tile Keywords
  • Tile Information
  • Refresh Interval in Seconds

 

Requirement:

The requirement is to add a 'Tile Subtitle' and 'Tile Icon' to the standard Fiori app 'Customers Overview'.

 

Steps:

Now, let's walk through the steps to achieve the desired adaptation:

  • Open the 'Customers Overview' app in the SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library and identify the Technical Catalog ID associated with the app

  • Open the SAP Fiori Launchpad Application Manager app, either directly or by using transaction code ‘/UI2/FLPAM_ADAPT’

         

  • Open the Technical Catalog ID ‘SAP_TC_CEC_SD_COMMON’

        

  • In the technical catalog, select the relevant SAP Fiori ID from the list and access the details view. You can search for it as follows

         

         

        

  • Switch to adaptation mode by clicking on ‘Switch to Adaptation Mode’.

         

  • To make changes to the relevant items, enter edit mode

          

  • Enter the transport request (TR) details and navigate to the Adaptation Tab.

          

         

  • Perform the required changes by checking the Adapt checkbox for the fields you want to modify. In this case, enter the details for ‘Tile Subtitle’ and ‘Tile Icon’.         
  • To obtain the icon details, go to the SAP Icon Explorer and search for a suitable icon.          

 

  • Copy the icon details as highlighted in the screenshot below. These details will be entered in the adaptation view.         
  • Enter the required details in the adaptation view as follows: 

Results:

Open the Fiori Launchpad and test the ‘Customers Overview’ app. All the changes you applied should now be displayed.

entry.title: Re: Introducing Identity and Authentication Management in SAP Business One Cloud

any thing is missing?

entry.title: Need to avoid defaulting company code in business partner while extending FI vendor role
entry.content:
Hi All,

After creating Business partner with General role '000000',when I tried to extend with  role FI vendor(FLVN00),when press 'Company code' button by default company code 1000 is coming automatically. I want to stop this. Can somebody give any tips for this? 

Regards,

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA public cloud manage material coverage app functions missing
entry.content:
Good morning,

is it possobile using material coverage to consolidate multiple products or Suppliers onto a Single PO or PR?

entry.title: Optimizing Data Processing for UI Migration from SAP NetWeaver to BTP Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
There is UI Migration going exchange the current UI from SAP Netweaver to BTP Cloud Foundry without switching databases.

Presently, data is replicated from CRM to our On-Premise DB via SLT and from On-Premise DB it is getting replicated to HANA Cloud DB. We have also created Virtual tables in HANA Cloud DB.

The users are using SAP Netweaver to download the data and processing (SELECT, JOINS, etc) takes place when users initiate a download from On-Prem DB.

Users are now working on an Application and HDI which is querying the replicated Virtual tables in HANA Cloud DB. This is consuming all memory from HANA Cloud DB.

Hence, we have a requirement from DB side where the ask is to exclude the use HANA Cloud DB from processing any queries (as we get memory issues due to big tables) and ensuring all data processing happens directly within On-Premise DB instead of HANA Cloud DB.

Since the data is Day Based, we are thinking for creating views using filters like country or region in On-Premise Database and replicating these views on HANA Cloud such that data will be pre-processed and ready for download for users, removing the need for any processing at the time the user clicks download.

Could anyone kindly let us know if this is approach is good and can be done. If not, we are open to suggestion if it can be done in any other better way. Please help!..

entry.title: 0PROFIT_CTR_0106_HIER unable to load 2 different hierarchy into BW with 2 Infopackage
entry.content:
Hi all,

For the DS 0PROFIT_CTR_0106_HIER, we got 2 hierarchy (GGGPROFITCTR1, GGGPROFITCTR2) to load, I have created Infopage for GGGPROFITCTR1 and save info package and tried to create another info package and selected GGGPROFITCTR2, while saving always info package selection changes to GGGPROFITCTR1, in selection screen for 2 different info packages selects only one hierarchy.

Kindly advise how to load 2 hierarchy in BW 7.5.

Regards

Maran

entry.title: Re: Set up your SAP S/4HANA system for EAM Inspection Checklists
entry.content:
Hello Frauke and Uwe,

thank you for this documentation!

When I want to define the shop paper, I need to enter PRINT_PAPER in the field Form. This form, however, doesn't exist in the mandant where I do the customizing. Do you have the settings for this form so that I can create it?

Thanks and kind regards,

Kerstin

entry.title: Re: Set Default Home Page in SAC
entry.content:
1. Goto your application in edit mode -> share -> customize link -> remove link
  2. Goto your story -> share -> customize link -> type 'Homepage' in second input field -> save

entry.title: SSR Challenges in SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
Introduction

SSR activation and challenges behind are often misunderstands. This article will try to clarify as much as possible why SSR is not just like CSR in server side. 

We won't enter in technical optimisation details. Two great articles already did that:

  • https://community.sap.com/t5/crm-and-cx-blogs-by-sap/composable-storefront-ssr-performance-and-timeout-troubleshooting/ba-p/13574075
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/crm-and-cx-blogs-by-sap/managing-performance-of-server-side-rendering-in-commerce-cloud/ba-p/13620636

The aim is to give you general understanding of different challenges and steps to achieve acceptable SSR performance.


NodeJS single-thread

One big misunderstanding is how SSR (NodeJs) is processing/rendering page content. Unlike CSR (Browser), NodeJS is single thread to handle multiple concurrent calls where Browser is handling one unique page rendering with multi-CPU/threads. 

In other words, hardware vertical scale cannot be executed to improve performance or to support more workload. Even worst, any page rendering must be optimized as much as possible to be executed as fast as possible by one unique CPU in order to let main thread handles next request as quick as possible. This queue task processing can easily lead you to timeout issue.

Two solutions must be applied :

  1. Tracking down non-optimal code processing in local environnement with SSR mode activated
  2. Add CDN caching at each SSR outputs

 

CDN Caching

As you understand in previously chapter, SSR outputs must be set in cache. Even more, SSR is not designed to handle concurrent calls. That point means SSR should serves one time each page and then CDN should serve the content. In other words :

  • Caching TTL must be longer as possible (at least one day)
  • Most of content must be designed for anonymous users (personalized content will be served by CSR re-hydratation).
  • CDN Caching size should be enough large to contain all websites pages

 

SSR Caching

When SSR is processing content, common data or/and calls can be executed to render any page as BaseSites for example. It is important to identify those parts and set them in local SSR caching.

 

OCC API Caching

SSR is executing same code as Browser to render a page. For that, it will need to do external call to fetch raw data (CMS Content, Product Content). SAP Commerce Cloud is exposing this data through OCC API. 

As other anonymous content, OCC API should be setup in cache to reduce processing/response time. And, as we already see, it is more impacting in SSR than CSR.

For caching, two different strategy can be applied :

  • OCC API caching (local at each node)
  • CDN caching (global for the solution)

OCC API caching reduces network latency but it increases memory consumption and caching warm up time. Where, CDN caching is increasing network latency (from 10 to 30ms), has some limitation with SNAT exhaustion and reduces caching warm up time.

When it is possible, CDN caching should be privileged.

 

WebCore vitals

Last but not least : the WebCore vitals, It is not rare to see better response time in CSR than SSR first. LCP and FCP are deeply impacted by CSR re-hydratation. 

When SSR first is activated, Browser will load firstly full page content from SSR output and then apply what we call CSR re-hydratation. If CSR has been badly implemented, the CSS and Images can be reloaded on top of SSR rendering. This overriding processing delays LCP / FCP response time. 

Solution is to debug closely how page is rendering by browser and see how CSR can be applied to enrich SSR rendering instead of overriding it.

 

Conclusion

SSR optimisation is complex topic and it can demand significant effort. You should not under estimate the complexity. SAP Commerce Composable Storefront is a headless framework solution that should help you to achieve easier this goal (and many others). However, the best practices must be respected.

SAP Expert Services can help you to apply those best practices and implement the needed optimisations.

entry.title: Re: First release of B2B Integration Factory – Integration Packages and their Extensions
entry.content:
Hi Gunther,

Thanks for the excellent blog!!

Any future updates to standard 'Cloud Integration - Trading Partner Management V2' packages, will also be reflected in 'B2B Integration Factory - Cloud Integration - Trading Partner Management' package?

entry.title: How to display LOB columns in Analysis for Office - AFO
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have one HANA table which stores the NLOB ( Long text values ) values & I am able to create a HANA CV on top of that table . 

HANA Studio level I can see that NLOB columns without any issues in Raw Data Tab using Data Preview.

The same HANA CV when I try to consume it via Analysis for Office - AFO , that NLOB column is not coming into the report structure & its automatically skipped it seems when adding data source into Work sheet. Do we need to enable anything at AFO level to see them ?

Br

Kiran K

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
hi @David_Chaviano 

I fall in the following below categaries

People looking to switch their careers mid-life

People who lack the financial means to afford a certification attempt for themselves

This certification attempt will lead me towards financial stability and career growth.

Thankyou in advance.

 

Regards,

Ahsan Rais

entry.title: Re: Performance Optimization of Calculation Views
entry.content:
Have you seen this Performance Guide?

https://help.sap.com/docs/hana-cloud-database/sap-hana-cloud-sap-hana-database-performance-guide-for-developers/optimization-features-in-calculation-views

Is it helpful?

Regards,
--Witalij

entry.title: Re: Problem with updating fields in organization unit using c4codataapi
entry.content:
@leonardo_felini @prat2 

The root cause of the issue, is that the incoming value is the same with the current value in the object.

If you try to Patch passing the value <d:EndDate>9999-12-31T00:00:00</d:EndDate> without changing anything else and the current value is 9999-12-31T00:00:00 the request will fail, with the known error message.

If you try to pass the value 9999-12-30T00:00:00, that will work. I don't know why that happens, but makes no sense for a Patch request.

entry.title: Re: SAML2 Single Sign-on with Email Address
entry.content: We are also facing the same issue kindly suggest us the claim rule settings which is used to fix this.

entry.title: Re: Custom Fields and Logics - Create and Capturing the Changes into Transport Request
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have implemented SAP CFL using custom drop-down list in BP T-code and backend it's saved BUT000 table everything working fine.  Captured under the one package and transported to quality and production.

Now we have an additional requirement add few more entries to the custom fields values table for the dropdown list. I have added and publish in SAP CFL it is working fine.

Now my concern is this additional requirement which is captured automatically in a new TR Contains all objects and not just the custom fields values added in the TR. 

Please confirm this is the Standard behaviors is there any way to Only Capture the custom field values changes in the TR.

Thanks

 

 

 

I have a required a requirement

entry.title: Re: How to use Action in a Task automation
entry.content:
Hi Koushik,

Thank you for your advice.

I've noticed something interesting. Although the action needs to be invoked through the Process initially, once the process is saved, the 'Action groups' become available in the right panel of the Task Automation window and the action can be used directly within the Automation window.

entry.title: Re: How to display LOB columns in Analysis for Office - AFO
entry.content: @TammyPowlas - Could you please help with the issue

entry.title: Celebrating Milestones with SAP Learning Hub: Your One-Stop-Shop for Upskilling and Career Growth
entry.content:
It’s only been a few months since SAP officially launched the enhanced SAP Learning Hub – but the success of the new premium, guided learning offering already shows that it’s exactly what future-oriented learners in the tech sector are looking for. So, let’s celebrate a couple of huge milestones with us today and learn more about why SAP Learning Hub is your one-stop-shop to learn a new skill, get certified, and boost your career in times of rapid technological innovations!

One Subscription is all You Need

In case you didn’t know it yet: The launch of the enhanced SAP Learning Hub marked a major step in the evolution of all things SAP solution learning. Knowing that tech changes faster than ever before – let’s just think about AI for a second! –, SAP professionals and those aspiring to become one need to quickly gain new skills, adapt to changing environments, and get certified faster to prove their expertise to (future) employers. That’s what the enhanced SAP Learning Hub is here for.

Providing access to great content, expert guidance in digital live sessions, on-demand hands-on practice systems, advanced analytics and learning management functionalities, plus four included SAP Certification exam attempts per learner per year, a subscription to the enhanced SAP Learning Hub ensures you stay relevant and ahead of the game. And apparently, it pays off.

Favorite Live Session Topic Comes as No Surprise

With more than 150,000 registrants in live sessions in 2024 so far, the popularity of this offer is increasing rapidly and continuously. And the year isn’t over yet! But with hundreds of sessions to choose from each month, opportunities to engage with live experts and participants from all over the world, we couldn’t be happier about the results!

And if you ever wondered about the most popular live session topics, take a look at the current Top 5 – which one is your favorite?

  • Artificial Intelligence
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition
  • GROW with SAP
  • RISE with SAP
  • SAP Business Technology Platform, ABAP Environment

New Type of Practice System and More Enhancements

When you’re diving into a new SAP solution, it’s important to get a good first look at the software and how it’s running, right? That’s where another amazing feature of the enhanced SAP Learning Hub comes in: Practice systems.  There are more than 340 systems available to you – plus two sandbox systems – to explore, test, experiment and build use cases with your SAP solution.

And as we know you like to take your time exploring, we extended the system availability to 21 days for a couple of longer courses. Cool, huh? (If you want to learn more about practice systems, I highly recommend checking out this podcast).

And if you are interested in the most famous topics in SAP Learning Hub – let us unveil the secret: It’s of course SAP S/4HANA Cloud, both Private and Public Edition, and SAP’s future-ready enterprise resource planning (ERP) system. But SAP SuccessFactors is also very popular among users.

Still unsure about the benefits of SAP Learning Hub?

Then look no further! A recent study from Forrester now shows that upskilling with SAP Learning Hub helps customers gain the right skills critical to drive digital transformation – while also ensuring project success and maximizing the return on investment your organizations made with SAP solutions.

Forrester presented the following benefits of using SAP Learning Hub to upskill:

  • Improved upskilling due to greater learning access, resulting in productivity gains of up to 25%: As a source of extensive, high-quality, and digitally accessible guided SAP learning resources for those in more expert roles, SAP Learning Hub equipped users with the knowledge they need to stay up to speed and learn new skills.
  • Cost savings of 50% with digital delivery. Organizations find SAP Learning Hub to be a cost-effective solution that users can access anytime for self-paced training. It complements the organization’s existing training methods, which ultimately results in cost savings of $1.1 million over three years.
  • To learn more about the study, check out this blog post.

Bring out your best now

The enhanced SAP Learning Hub provides a comprehensive learning offering for you to gain new skills, access expert guidance, and get certified, ultimately boosting your career prospects and success in a rapidly evolving technological landscape. Make sure you bring out your best and get started today.

entry.title: Redis on SAP BTP - INDEX of official blog posts
entry.content:
If you are looking for official blog posts published by the Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option product team, you have come to the right place.

We have joined all our blogs in the list below and will update with new blogs once they are released. Besides these blogs please also check out other interesting blogs colleagues and developers have written while working with our service. 

Enjoy your reading!

Blog Index:

Redis on SAP BTP - Introduction to start using the service
Redis on SAP BTP - Create a service instance in CF via BTP Cockpit
Redis on SAP BTP - Understanding service entitlements and metrics
Redis on SAP BTP - Connect to the instance from your local PC via SSH tunnel

Recently added:

Redis on SAP BTP - Update instance configuration parameters via CF Command Line Interface
Redis on SAP BTP - Populate a dataset to Redis cache instance using redis-cli data import

BTP Backing Services - Product Management

entry.title: Re: Create task in My Timesheet for EPPM Projects for uns...
entry.content: Work Packages only refer to Customer Projects.  Use the Other Accounting Object option and select an Enterprise project WBS.

we are enabling AI features "AI-Assisted Skills Matching for Applicant Screening" ,while assigning business rule to Recruiting Billing and Subscription Configuration we are getting below error while selecting external code " Default billing and subscription and configuration"

No data available or you do not have the necessary permission

entry.title: Re: Investment Management Fiori Apps

entry.title: Re: How to use side effects in RAP
entry.content:
Hello Andre,

maybe can you give me a hint what i need to do to achieve the following (or tell me that it is not possible atm).

I have a draft enabled complex RAP entity and on its object page, inline editing of its text table is possible. In the header section i show the root entities ID together with its localized text.

Is there a way to achieve that when i press enter after changing the text in logon language - means: saving draft is triggered - to also update the field in the header?

What works is changing the entry, pressing enter, navigating into it's details and back.

Talking about BTP ABAP 24xx.

Best regards,

Robert

entry.title: Re: Smart Data Streaming - File/Hadoop Json - Array Issue
entry.content: @Pai_N - You should post your question as a new thread both because you are using a different adapter than was discussed in this thread and because you are asking how to process the json payload rather than having an issue with the adapter retrieving the json file. Please also note that HANA streaming analytics will reach end of mainstream maintenance in 2025 and will not be extended. SAP is not recommending initiating any new projects using SAP HANA streaming analytics. https://me.sap.com/notes/3440255

entry.title: Re: Hello,Does anyone have information on the current S4H...
entry.content:
Hi Toni,

 

the current S4HANA SAP User License Model can be found here:

User Classification (sap.com)

The tool you are looking for is the STAR Service, described in this note:

3113382 - Authorization-based SAP S/4HANA User Simulation / FUE Projection - SAP for Me

 

You can still use your ECC licenses in a product conversion scenario, yes.

 

Best regards,

Torben

entry.title: Re: BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CREATE:: M8 524 :: You cannot process conditions for delivery costs
entry.content: Thanks

entry.title: Re: CPI Connectivity to Microsft SQL Server using Open Connectors
entry.content: Hello ankit_mishra09, for the roles/access, is "usage" access is sufficient on the DB/Schema? This is allowing SAP CPI to read the data from snowflake. On the table, snowflake was given sAP CPI role on "select" and "update" permission.

entry.title: PRT availabilty check planned orders
entry.content:
Hey Gurus,

a customer I am currently working with raised the requirement that he wants to be able to check PRT availabilty for planned orders. As far as i know this availabily check is only possible for production orders right? Is there any way to check the PRT availability for planned orders? Their PRTs are maintained in the system as far as i know with a material master.

 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: TMS - Transport SAP Cloud Integration (CI/CPI) Content with Transport Management Service (TMS) a
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a question about below diagram. Can anyone help me to understand what is the role of Destination 2 created in CAS subaccount pointing to CI service and what exactly this destination will be used for?

As per my understanding Destination 1 will help to bundle the artifacts by connecting to CAS and from CAS the bundle will be available for import to the next TEST NODE using Destination 3 and further Destination 4 and 5 are used to push the content to target CI tenants. 

Could you please correct me if my understand is wrong and also throw some light on usage of Destination2 mentioned below.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM, tenant extension now available on the SAP Price List
entry.content: To all interested: you can find more information on using the multiple tenants here.

entry.title: Re: Unable to Delete an attachment from "Manage Bank Accounts" Fiori app.
entry.content: Some wweks ago, i had the same question and i got answer from SAP. The button only works aslong the newly attached document is not saved. Then it is possible to delete this document. After saving it is only possible with transaction CV*. In my opinion this is not a user-friendly solution. But in the meantime the whole attachment thing works much better, but only in public cloud version of S/4HANA (f.e. https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/discovering-bank-account-administration-in-sap-s-4hana/managing-documents-in-the-manage-bank-accounts-fiori-app_b45d3833-61a7-42a9-8b4a-d22ac85c7a29).

entry.title: Re: Installing Composable Storefront for SAP Commerce 2211.20
entry.content:
trying to install composable storefront but getting following error while running command

ng add @Spartacus/schematics@latest

 

"require() of ES Module D:\js-storefront\mystore2211\node_modules\@angular\compiler\fesm2022\compiler.mjs not supported.
Instead change the require of D:\js-storefront\mystore2211\node_modules\@angular\compiler\fesm2022\compiler.mjs to a dynamic import() which is available in all CommonJS modules."

Please help me quickly

entry.title: How to assign Purchase Organization to Company Code in CBC
entry.content:
Hello,

 

We are unable to find an option to assign Purchase Organization to Company code in Set Up Organizational Structure.

Please help.

 

Best regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to assign Purchase Organization to Company Code i...
entry.content:
Dear Team,

 

It is not possible to assign Purchase Organization directly to Company Code, the assignment will look like this: Company Code -> Plant -> Purchase Organization.

You can assign Plant to your Company Code, then assign Purchase Organization to the Plant, this way the PO will be linked to the specific Company Code.

Below documents can help to understand this process:

SAP Help - Organizational Units

SAP Help - Purchasing Organization

 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Hello,Does anyone have information on the current S4H...
entry.content: thank you
